docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 77408612) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIN, WEIYI AS TO DEFENDANT ALVIAREZRODRIGUEZ, NIXON ALEXIS SALCEDOPABON, JESUS LEONEL DOES 1 TO 10 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-25-2026 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-22-2025 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-02-2026
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 77408612) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIN, WEIYI
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 77408612) TO PLAINTIFF LIN, WEIYI
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 78574294) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIN, WEIYI JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 3.0 DAYS
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-25-2026 CONTINUED TO MAY-27-2026 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-07-2026 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-27-2026 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT ; ENTIRE ACTION, EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN FEES AND COSTS (TRANSACTION ID # 79508730)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-07-2026 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
